Shortcuts-ick.error-environment: [img=utility.warning_icon] [color=yellow]Error in mod "Shortcuts for 2.0":[/color] Failed to add a filter for all __1__ prototypes (max. 255). It is recommended to disable the "[color=blue]Environment __ITEM__deconstruction-planner__[/color]" per player settings "__ENTITY__cliff__", "__ENTITY__fish__" and "__ENTITY__item-on-ground__" and enable both "__ENTITY__tree-proxy__" and "Rocks".

mod-setting-name.ick-prepare-uninstall: Prepare a startup setting change or uninstallation of the [color=yellow]"Shortcuts for 2.0"[/color] mod.

mod-setting-description.ick-compatibility-mode: Enable this in case an overhaul mod makes it impossible to access certain shortcuts.
mod-setting-description.ick-tags: Choose whether you want tags, icons or nothing in front of the names of shortcuts added by this mod.\n\nIn the settings menu the tags will always be visible.
mod-setting-description.ick-prepare-uninstall:
[img=utility.danger_icon] Be careful! This setting will enable all disabled equipment in the whole save. You can type one of theses four options:

- [color=yellow]uninstall[/color] = Allows you to savely uninstall this mod. 
- [color=yellow]active-defense-equipment[/color] = Enables all personal laser defense equipment, allowing you to savely disable the __1__ setting. 
- [color=yellow]belt-immunity-equipment[/color] = Enables all belt immunity equipment, allowing you to savely disable the __2__ setting. 
- [color=yellow]night-vision-equipment[/color] = Enables all night vision equipment, allowing you to savely disable the __3__ setting.

If you remove the mod or disable aforementioned settings without using this setting first, all disabled equipment will be lost.
